{ "name": "symfony/finder", "type": "library", "description": "Finds files and directories via an intuitive fluent interface", "keywords": [], "homepage": "https://symfony.com", "license": "MIT", "authors": [ { "name": "Fabien Potencier", "email": "fabien@symfony.com" }, { "name": "Symfony Community", "homepage": "https://symfony.com/contributors" } ], "require": { "php": ">=8.2" }, "require-dev": { "symfony/filesystem": "^6.4|^7.0|^8.0" }, "autoload": { "psr-4": { "Symfony\\Component\\Finder\\": "" }, "exclude-from-classmap": [ "/Tests/" ] }, "minimum-stability": "dev" }
